name: markdown-preview-editor
description: Preview, visually review, and safely edit local Markdown files from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Preview and edit local Markdown safely.
interface.longDescription: Open local Markdown in a polished localhost preview, review layouts and linked assets, then edit visually or in source mode with conflict-safe autosave.
defaultPrompt: Preview this Markdown file in the local editor.
Open this report and check its tables and images.
Let me visually edit this Markdown document.
